历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science) was approximately 7691 → 9009 → 9925 → 13449 → 12891, showing a clear backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5200 places in the past 4 years; in 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination, there was a significant fluctuation (13449th place), and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 12891st place; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 12891st place; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangxi Province has been continuously expanding from 2021 to 2025 (53 → 55 → 59 → 62 → 64 students); the 2026 plan is 70 students, an increase of about 9.4% compared to 2025, intensifying competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 66th in the main ranking of Chinese universities by Shanghai Ranking (2026), with a stable ranking in the 65–76 range in recent years, making it one of the top domestic finance and economics institutions; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion; the comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 92nd, rated as average, with medium to low exposure on short video platforms; no signs of admission gaps for Southwestern University of Finance and Economics in historical admission anomaly records; Applied Economics A+ (top in China), Business Administration A, Statistics A-; Statistics, Economic Statistics and other enrollment majors directly correspond to advantageous disciplines; Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Technology), although not the university's traditional advantageous disciplines, benefit from the overall popularity of the IT industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science was recommended as hot in 2024–2025 (slightly hot), Electronics/Communication was highly recommended as hot, Electrical Engineering and Automation was highly recommended as hot, Finance/Economics was differentiated and wait-and-see; the number of Physics Category examinees in Jiangxi Province was about 266,000 in 2025, estimated at about 268,000 in 2026 (based on total examinees of 474,900 with Physics Category accounting for 56.4%), with a slight increase in examinee scale; Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, and is a cross-provincial enrollment; the university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province for Physics Category is about 4%–5%, not a major source area, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12891st place, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of about 9.4% (intensifying competition), a slight increase in Physics Category examinees in Jiangxi Province, the continued heating up of popular majors such as Computer Science and Electronics/Information, and the differentiation in the popularity of Finance and Economics, and considering that the attraction of IT popular majors to Physics Category examinees may partially offset the competition dilution caused by expansion, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 13596th place, with a range of 13096–14096th place.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 13596th place, range 13096–14096th place. For rankings in the middle of the range (around 13596), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main force, Tier 1 for a sprint, and Tier 3 as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<13096), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Accounting CPA direction, Computer Top-Notch Class); for rankings close to the upper limit of the range (>14096), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 as the main force, supplemented by Tier 2. Popular majors such as Computer Science and Statistics are highly competitive, and the popularity of Finance and Economics majors is differentiated. It is recommended to make a comprehensive choice based on personal interests and career plans.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) was approximately 1378 → 1434 → 1400 → 1989 → 1566, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; in 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination, there was a significant fluctuation (ranking 1989), and in 2025 it rebounded to 1566, with a cumulative backward shift of about 166 positions in the last two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1566; the enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi Province for History Category was 32–37 students from 2021 to 2023, and stabilized at 36 students in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan is 31 students, a reduction of about 13.9% compared to 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 66th in the main ranking of Chinese universities by Shanghai Ranking (2026), with a stable ranking in the 65–76 range in recent years, making it one of the top domestic finance and economics institutions; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving management topics such as campus reservation policies, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 92nd, rated as average, with moderately low exposure on short video platforms and no significant signal of increased application interest; Applied Economics A+ (top in China), Business Administration A, Statistics A-, all core disciplines in finance and economics; flagship majors such as Accounting (Certified Public Accountant direction) and Finance are highly aligned with advantageous disciplines, maintaining continuous appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of finance/finance and economics/economics majors in 2024–2025 is assessed as divergent and wait-and-see, with overall popularity cooling compared to the peak in 2021; the number of History Category candidates in Jiangxi Province is approximately 206,000 in 2025, and estimated at about 207,000 in 2026 (based on total candidates of 474,900 with a History Category proportion of 43.6%), with the candidate scale basically flat; Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, and is a cross-provincial enrollment; the proportion of History Category enrollment in Jiangxi Province is about 2.5%–3%, not a major source area, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1566, the 2026 plan reduction of about 13.9% (easing competition), the basically flat number of History Category candidates in Jiangxi Province, the divergent and wait-and-see popularity of finance and economics majors, and the neutral reputation of the university; considering the stable candidate scale and no significant rebound in finance and economics application enthusiasm, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 1446, with a range of 1186–1706.
